ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Current population of the country */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded population density */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density value */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the population density data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_density_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_density_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each density entry
Year of the recorded population density
Source of the population density data
Quality or reliability of the data
Additional notes or comments about the data entry
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
